spec.description: CloudNativePG Postgres health, workload, storage, replication, backup, and PgBouncer pooler metrics for the Tuist managed database.

panels.description: Minimum exporter-reported Postgres health across the selected CNPG instance pods.
panels.title: Postgres Up

panels.description: CloudNativePG operator scrape health.
panels.title: Operator Up

panels.description: PgBouncer scrape health for the processor pooler.
panels.title: Pooler Up

panels.description: Active and idle Postgres backends across selected databases.
panels.title: Connections

panels.description: Total logical database size reported by Postgres.
panels.title: Database Size

panels.description: Seconds since the latest CNPG-available base backup timestamp.
panels.title: Backup Age

panels.description: Connections by pg_stat_activity state.
panels.title: Connections By State

panels.description: Connection utilization against the Postgres max_connections setting.

targets.expr: 100 * sum(cnpg_backends_total{namespace=~"$namespace", cnpg_cluster=~"$cnpg_cluster", pod=~"$pod", datname=~"$database"}) / clamp_min(max(cnpg_pg_settings_setting{namespace=~"$namespace", cnpg_cluster=~"$cnpg_cluster", pod=~"$pod", name="max_connections"}), 1)

panels.title: Connection Usage

panels.description: Maximum open transaction duration by user and application.

targets.expr: topk(10, max by (usename, application_name) (cnpg_backends_max_tx_duration_seconds{namespace=~"$namespace", cnpg_cluster=~"$cnpg_cluster", pod=~"$pod", datname=~"$database"}))

panels.title: Longest Transaction

panels.description: Committed and rolled-back transaction rate by database.
panels.title: Transaction Rate

panels.description: Inserted, updated, and deleted row rate by database.
panels.title: Row Write Rate

panels.description: Blocked backends waiting on locks or other queries.
panels.title: Waiting Backends

panels.description: Postgres buffer cache hit percentage.

targets.expr: 100 * sum by (datname) (rate(cnpg_pg_stat_database_blks_hit{namespace=~"$namespace", cnpg_cluster=~"$cnpg_cluster", pod=~"$pod", datname=~"$database"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (datname) (rate(cnpg_pg_stat_database_blks_hit{namespace=~"$namespace", cnpg_cluster=~"$cnpg_cluster", pod=~"$pod", datname=~"$database"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(cnpg_pg_stat_database_blks_read{namespace=~"$namespace", cnpg_cluster=~"$cnpg_cluster", pod=~"$pod", datname=~"$database"}[$__rate_interval])), 1)

panels.title: Cache Hit %

panels.description: Logical database size by database.
panels.title: Database Size

panels.description: PersistentVolumeClaim capacity consumed by each CNPG data volume.
panels.title: PVC Usage %

panels.description: Temporary file bytes created by queries.
panels.title: Temp Bytes

panels.description: WAL bytes generated by the selected instances.
panels.title: WAL Generated

panels.description: WAL segments on disk and archive queue state.
panels.title: WAL Files And Archive Queue

panels.description: CPU cores used by CNPG instance pods.

targets.expr: sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$namespace", container!="", image!=""}[$__rate_interval]) * on (namespace, pod) group_left() max by (namespace, pod) (up{job="tuist-cnpg-instances", namespace=~"$namespace", cnpg_cluster=~"$cnpg_cluster", pod=~"$pod"}))

panels.title: CPU

panels.description: Memory working set for CNPG instance pods.

targets.expr: sum by (pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", container!="", image!=""} * on (namespace, pod) group_left() max by (namespace, pod) (up{job="tuist-cnpg-instances", namespace=~"$namespace", cnpg_cluster=~"$cnpg_cluster", pod=~"$pod"}))

panels.title: Memory

panels.description: Container restarts over the selected time range.

targets.expr: sum by (pod) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__range]) * on (namespace, pod) group_left() max by (namespace, pod) (up{job="tuist-cnpg-instances", namespace=~"$namespace", cnpg_cluster=~"$cnpg_cluster", pod=~"$pod"}))

panels.title: Restarts

panels.description: Replica replay lag as observed by each instance.
panels.title: Replication Lag

panels.description: Streaming replicas connected to the primary.
panels.title: Streaming Replicas

panels.description: Expected, observed, minimum, and maximum synchronous replica counts.
panels.title: Sync Replicas

panels.description: CNPG high-availability signals that should usually stay at zero, except nodes_used.
panels.title: CNPG HA Signals

panels.description: Replication slot WAL retained behind the current WAL location.
panels.title: Replication Slot Lag

panels.description: Base backup and recoverability timestamps exposed by CNPG.
panels.title: Backup Timeline

panels.description: Successful and failed WAL archive operations.
panels.title: WAL Archive Rate

panels.description: Seconds since the last successful or failed WAL archive event.
panels.title: WAL Archive Freshness

panels.description: PgBouncer client connections by state.
panels.title: Pooler Clients

panels.description: PgBouncer server connections by state.
panels.title: Pooler Servers

panels.description: Oldest client wait time for a server connection.
panels.title: Pooler Max Wait

panels.description: PgBouncer query and transaction throughput.
panels.title: Pooler Throughput

panels.description: Average PgBouncer query, transaction, and wait time converted from microseconds to milliseconds.
panels.title: Pooler Latency

panels.description: Average network throughput through PgBouncer.
panels.title: Pooler Network

spec.title: Tuist PostgreSQL CNPG
